data.body: LANDING PHASE. ALL 10 bug fixes pushed + sibling 3b4e (519 compact/delete/init index.lock wiring). MERGED: 507 skill, 510 #5, 512 #2. IN REVIEW: 508 #4, 509 #1, 513 #3, 514 #7, 515 #9, 516 #10, 517 #6, 518 #8, 519 3b4e. Tickets CLOSED: d8e9, 1d63. CI FAILURES being handled: 514 #7 failed integration concurrency tier with 'could not parse HEAD/index.lock' — that's the flake #2 fixes; 514 was on pre-#2 base, REBASED onto current main (has #2) to resolve. 518 #8 failed module-size gate (grounding/resolve.py 736->872 crossed 800 cap) — #8 subagent resumed to EXTRACT new env-resolution funcs into new grounding/environment.py module. 508/509/513 rebased for FFO. REMAINING LANDING (serial, FFO, CI-gated ~13min each): submit each green change, ff main checkout from GERRIT remote, close its ticket (completion verifier). 562f closes AFTER 519 merges (compact wired). Watch: FFO forces rebase of pending on each merge; use Gerrit REST /rebase; reclaim stale tickets index.lock >30s.
